response: Founded in 1861, the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) is ranked the #1 university in the world, with an endowment of $24.6 billion and an annual tuition of $57,590. The prestigious institution enrolls approximately 11,500 students and is taught by 1,069 faculty members, yet maintains an exceptionally selective acceptance rate of just 3.9%. MIT's academic excellence is further underscored by its remarkable legacy of 98 Nobel laureates associated with the university.
